title: Redesign 'Get in Touch' CTA section on Home page to match uploaded screenshot

requirements.summary: Redesign the 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page to exactly match the uploaded screenshot with golden yellow background, bold heading, three CTA buttons (consultation, call, WhatsApp), and trust badges, ensuring full responsiveness and consistent typography
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page has a solid golden yellow (#f5c518) background across its full width.
The heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?' is displayed in bold dark navy (#0a1628) using the same Poppins/Inter font family as the rest of the site, matching the screenshot style.
The subtitle 'Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations' is displayed in dark navy below the heading.

Three CTA buttons are visible side-by-side on desktop: 'Get Free Consultation' (dark navy background, white text, phone icon), 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' (dark navy background, white text, phone icon linking to tel:9279242122), and 'WhatsApp Us' (green #22c55e background, white text, WhatsApp icon linking to https://wa.me/918102906339 in a new tab).
Three trust badges are displayed below the buttons: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes' in dark navy text.
On mobile screens (< 640px), the three buttons stack vertically.
No other section on the Home page is modified.
Font family matches the global Inter/Poppins configuration with no overrides.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing 'Get in Touch' / CTA section with a redesigned version matching image-2.png: Apply a full-width golden yellow (#f5c518) background to the section container. Add the heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?' in bold dark navy (#0a1628) text using the existing Poppins/Inter font family, followed by the subtitle 'Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations' in dark navy text. Render three CTA buttons horizontally on desktop: (1) 'Get Free Consultation' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text, (2) 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text linking to tel:9279242122, and (3) 'WhatsApp Us' with a WhatsApp/message icon on green (#22c55e) background with white text linking to https://wa.me/918102906339 opening in a new tab. Below the buttons, display three trust badge lines: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes' in dark navy text. Use Tailwind responsive utilities to stack the buttons vertically on screens smaller than 640px. Ensure all text uses the global Poppins/Inter font configuration without introducing new font overrides. Do not modify any other sections on the Home page (hero, stats, services preview, strengths).
